description: Sensors in a poultry house show that the temperature and ammonia levels are rising above the acceptable thresholds.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the environmental alert and retrieve real-time data for temperature, humidity, and ammonia.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the parameters are out of the safe range.

nodes.task_description: Automatically activate the ventilation fans and cooling systems to bring the temperature down.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends commands to the environmental control system.

nodes.task_description: Send an alert to the farm manager to notify them of the situation and the automated action taken.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a clear notification message.
